true_header: Confidentiality and non-disclosure agreeement between transnet limited and ______________________________________________________
Where the receiving party is obliged to disclose by law,
Return of confidential information. promptly following the request of the disclosing party,
Term and termination. notwithstanding whether or not the proposed transactions are concluded,
Storage of confidential information. the confidential information must not be copied, reproduced,
Partner  ireland  insurance  limited of  5 th floor,
Individual(s) submitting information via the interactive e-handshake on partnerre.com
The parties agree and understand that,
The parties intend to execute this agreement as a deed.
The disclosers wish to disclose confidential information to the recipient in relation to the purpose and to:
Data, ideas and information (whether technical, commercial,
Information relating to the customers, suppliers, methods, products, plans, finances,
Information acquired by observation by the recipient or any authorised person at the offices of or other premises of the disclosers relating to the purpose or to the affairs of the disclosers;
The contemplation and implementation of the purpose,
Including any applications to protect or register such rights;
Including all renewals and extensions of such rights or applications;
Including rights in the nature of unfair competition rights and rights to sue in passing off;
Reference to this agreement includes its schedules,
Any table of contents, background section and any clause,
Reference to a ‘party’ includes that party’s personal representatives,
Reference to a ‘person’ includes a natural person,
Reference to a ’company’ includes any company,
Reference to a gender includes each other gender;
Words in the singular include the plural and vice versa;
Provision and use of confidential information
Keep all the confidential information secret and confidential,
To the extent determined from time to time by the disclosers,
None of the disclosers, its group members,
The recipient's obligations under this agreement do not apply to,
Upon receipt by the recipient of a written demand from the disclosers:
Nothing in this agreement purports to limit or exclude any liability for fraud.
No failure, delay or omission by either party in exercising any right,
No single or partial exercise of any right,
This agreement may be signed in any number of separate counterparts,
The language of this agreement is english. all documents, notices, waivers,
Are referring to the letter of agreement between nmod and gi concerning industrial participation in further development of gripen and related projects (the "loa");
Noting their wish to exchange  information  for the  purpose of conducting evaluations  of the gripen aircraft,
Noting that such exchange  of information  may involve the disclosure  of confidential  information  by either  party,

Noting that exchanging  information with  gi shall also include exchanging information  with  saab and upon such disclosure  saab shall confirm  and be bound of the terms and conditions  contained  herein as if saab was a party to the  nda;

Noting that  exchanging  information with the  nmod shall also include other  norwegian authorities  and upon such disclosure  said norwegian authority  shall confirm  and be bound of the terms and conditions contained  herein as if said norwegian authority was a party to the  nda.

That it shall treat the confidential  information directly or indirectly disclosed to it by the  disclosing  party as strictly confidential  and will  not without obtaining  the  prior written  consent  of the  disclosing  party disclose  any part of the confidential  information to any third  party,
That it shall not make  use of any part of  the confidential information disclosed to it by the disclosing party,
That it shall give access to the  confidential  information only,
That it shall  not copy or reproduce  in any form  any of the confidential information  disclosed  to it by the  disclosing  party,
That it shall  keep a current  record of all copies and reproductions  of the confidential  information.
At the time of disclosure  or thereafter  available to the  public generally through  no failure  on the  part of the  receiving party;
Known to the  receiving party at the time of its disclosure;
Disclosed to the  receiving party by a third party having the  right to disclose confidential  information  and without  restrictions  as to use or disclosure;
Developed  independently  by the  receiving party without  use of or reference  to the confidential  information  received.
The fact that discussions and negotiations are taking place concerning the purpose and the status of those discussions and negotiations;
All  confidential  or  proprietary  information  relating  to:
Confidential information does not include information which:
Which  is  or  subsequently  becomes  public  knowledge  or  publicly  available  through  no  fault  of  the receiving party;
Which  is  known  by  the  receiving  party  prior  to  the  time  of  receipt,
Which  is  lawfully  obtained  by  the  receiving  party  from  a  third  party  and  is  not  subject  to  a  similar restriction on disclosure;
Which is independently developed by receiving party; or
The parties agree in writing is not confidential.
Keep the confidential information secret and confidential,
Not use or exploit the confidential information in any way except for the purpose;
Not disclose or make available any confidential information in whole or in part to any person except as expressly permitted by and in accordance with this agreement;
To establish and maintain adequate security measures to safeguard the confidential information from unauthorized access or use.
To its and its affiliate’s representatives,
As may be required by an order of any court of competent jurisdiction or governmental body in which case the receiving party shall,
Return or destruction of confidential information
Upon  the  disclosing  party’s  written  request,
Clause 5.1 of this agreement shall not apply to:
Confidential  information  held  electronically  in  archive  or  back-up  systems  which  are  not  otherwise reasonably retrievable by the representatives of the receiving party or its affiliates;
Copies  of  confidential  information  which  must  be  retained  by  the  receiving  party  pursuant  to applicable law.
Each party reserves all rights in its confidential information.
No obligation to disclose or continue discussions
Term and survival of confidentiality obligations
